summary: In Pinhel there is time to breathe, and also many stories to discover. It is in its people that the “Cidade Falcão” holds its greatest wealth. They are the ones who carry the stories, the traditions, the knowledge, the arts and gifts. It is from their hands that the beautiful handicrafts typical of the municipality and the unique excellence of its gastronomy and wines are born. It is also the people of Pinhel who keep the memories, passed down from generation to generation, of a piece of the history of Portugal that passed through there.
map: Map of the Historic Center and the Municipality
